message: Critical Bug Fix: Server File Permissions
changelog: Fixed critical Updater bug where files copied on Hostinger caused a 404 error due to missing CHMOD 0644 read permissions.
Strict fallback validation for Theme Settings Tabs.
Fixed Theme Settings navigation tabs stacking issue.
Added robust One-Click Update Wizard directly in the Admin Panel.
Overhauled the Theme Settings user interface to look elegant and responsive.
Fixed critical permission errors relating to missing database columns.
Resolved bugs with the install.php and run_migration.php scripts.
Implemented database safety logic to prevent dashboard crashes during upgrades.
